title: Mob Heads Powers
description: Gives the wearer a status effect based on the mob head equipped
body:
![mob heads powers datapack/mod title image minecraft](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/titles/mob_heads_powers.png)
[![jodeks datapacks discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6)   [![datapacks jodek youtube](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/YouTube.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@jodek)   [![mob heads powers minecraft datapack github issues](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Issues.png)](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/mob-heads-powers/issues)   [![jodeks datapacks kofi](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jodek)   [![github sponsor jodek](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Sponsor.png)](https://github.com/sponsors/Jodekq)
## Compatibility Only works with my [Mob Heads](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mob-heads) datapack/mod Fully translated with my [Jodeks translations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jodeks-translations) Resourecpack (German, French, Spanish, Japan, Chinese, Russian) ## Powers You get the power if you put the mob head on your head ### Aquatic | Name | Description | |------|-------------| | Axolotl | Longer water breathing | | Blue Axolotl | Longer water breathing + regeneration | | Turtle | Resistance 4 but slowness | | Frogs | Magma Cubes drop Froglights | | Tadpole | Water breathing and player is 1 block tall but suffocates out of water | | Salmon | Water breathing but suffocates out of water | | Cod | Water breathing but suffocates out of water | | Tropical Fish | Longer water breathing but suffocates out of water | | Puffer Fish | Gives poison for 30min + curse of binding | | Glow Squid | Water breathing + night vision + glowing but suffocates out of water | | Squid | Water breathing but suffocates out of water | | Dolphin | Dolphin's grace but hunger + blindness | | Elder Guardian | Drains nearby water + thorns | | Guardian | Thorns | | Drowned | More damage in water and rain | ### Pets | Name | Description | |------|-------------| | Copper Golem | 1-3. Stage: Channeling arrows when thunder. 4. Stage: Channeling arrows when any weather | | Allay | Slow falling but -4 HP | | Snow Golem | Leaves snow trail, takes damage in rain | | Cats | Scare creepers | | Black Cat | Night vision + no fall damage | | Wolfs | Strength 8 during full moon | | Parrots | Plays random parrot sounds every 10s | | Happy Ghast | Faster Happy Ghast | | Camel | Other players can ride you | | Camel Husk | Regenerate mount while riding | | Horses | Faster horse, random speed | | Zombie Horse | Faster player, random speed | | Skeleton Horse | Constantly Regenerate Pets | | Donkey | Step up 1.5 blocks | | Mule | Faster + step up 1.5 blocks | | Nautilus | Break blocks faster underwater | | Zombie Nautilus | Break blocks even faster at night | | Zombie Nautilus Coral | Duplicates corals + no silk touch + break blocks faster | ### Village/Pillage | Name | Description | |------|-------------| | Evoker | Wearing head summons thunder but player is hit by lightning | | Illusioner | ??? Turns invisible + random teleport when hit (30s cooldown) | | Vindicators | Faster axe attacks | | Pillager | Stronger crossbow shots | | Witch | 1/3 chance to keep potion | | Ravager | Player gets bigger +20HP, turns grass into paths | | Vex | Slow falling | | Wandering Trader | Invisible at night | | Iron Golem | Levitation hits | | Villagers | Clears weather but blinds for 30s | ### Passive Overworld | Name | Description | |------|-------------| | Bee | Poison hits but blinds player | | Chickens | 25% chance to drop egg every 10s | | Cows | Milk particle trail | | Mooshrooms | Leaves mushroom trail | | Pigs | Speed boost on mud | | _jeb Sheep | Colors nearby sheep like _jeb | | Sheep | Creates waypoint if head is on armor stand | | Rabbits | Luck, even more with rabbit foot in offhand | | Ocelot | Speed + 1 block tall | | Brown Panda | +8 to armor | | Pandas Brown Panda | 50% chance to not use vegan food | | Armadillo | Crouch for high resistance but can't move | | Bat | Night vision + vampirism, but shorter reach + taller | | Fox | Less fall damage (6 blocks safe) | | Arctic Fox | Less fall damage (10 blocks safe) | | Goats | Strong knockback hits | | Llama | Step up 3 blocks | | Trader Llama | Hero of the Village effect | | Polar Bear | Fish gives more hunger | | Sniffer | +20HP, slower + bigger, turns paths into dirt | ### Aggressive Overworld | Name | Description | |------|-------------| | Skeleton | Longer block reach (8) but -14HP | | Bogged | Shoot poison arrows | | Stray | Shoot slowness arrows | | Parched | Shoot weakness arrows | | Zombie | Raw meat restores more hunger | | Chicken Jockey | Trial Gambling | | Zombie Villager | Non-meat food restores more hunger | | Husk | Inflicts hunger on hit | | Charged Creeper | Getting hit makes you explode | | Creeper | Faster sneaking | | Cave Spider | Poison hits | | Spider | Climb walls/ceilings while sneaking | | Breeze | Jump boost when holding mace | | Creaking | Regeneration at night | | Phantom | Slow falling but slowness | | Silverfish | 1 block tall but slowness | | Slime | Jump boost | | Warden | Haste 8 | ### Nether | Name | Description | |------|-------------| | Blaze | Fire resistance + slow falling | | Ghast | Shoot explosive arrows | | Hoglin | Faster pig mounts | | Zoglin | Magnet for nearby blocks | | Zombified Piglin | Piglins are afraid of Player | | Piglin | New bartering trades | | Piglin Brute | Mined ores go straight into inventory | | Strider | Frost walker works for lava | | Magma Cube | Fire resistance + jump boost | | Wither Skeleton | Wither effect on hit | | Wither | Permanent bad omen effect + low gravity | | Wither Special | Shoot wither head arrows | ### End | Name | Description | |------|-------------| | Dragon | Shoot dragon's balls arrows | | Enderman | Longer block reach (6) | | Endermite | Teleports up if you fall in void | | Shulker | Levitation | ## Piglin Batering Trades | Item | Chance | |------|--------| | 23 Pottery Sherds | 2.07% | | Ancient Debris | 0.21% | | Upgrade Template | 1.04% | | 17 Armor Trims | 1.66% | | Silent Armor Trim | 0.62% | | 12 Basic Music Discs | 1.24% | | 9 Special Music Discs | 0.83% |
